title: stipa pennata subsp. lithophila
intro: Stipa pennata subsp. lithophila is a perennial grass species in the family Poaceae, commonly known as the Lithophila Fescue or Rock Fescue. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been associated with various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, soothing respiratory issues, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Stipa pennata subsp. lithophila often involve infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which are used to treat a range of health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
